SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-10-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-10-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF MARY RANDOLPH S PRESENT. DEFENDANT FENDI NORTH AMERICA, INC. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RANDOLPH, MARY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FENDI NORTH AMERICA, INC. $3,623.90 PRINCIPAL, $77.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,701.40 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
